name: New Cake-Like Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased ring-type baking mold.
3. Place in an oven preheated to 325°F (163°C).
4. Bake for 60 minutes.
5. Hard cooked eggs can be placed between layers of raw meat before cooking. Each hard cooked egg adds approximately 75 calories.
Yields: 4 servings - Approximately 250 calories per serving.
